node_5.subject: Mei Lin
node_5.description: This is Mei Lin's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, have breakfast with her family at 8:15 am, prepare for her course lectures from 9:00 am to 9:45 am, leave for Oak Hill College at 9:45 am, teach her philosophy course from 10:00 am to 2:00 pm, have lunch and a brief meeting with a colleague from 2:15 pm to 3:00 pm, head back home at 3:15 pm, help Eddy with his schoolwork from 3:30 pm to 4:30 pm.
